_comment_: Windows Claude Desktop MCP config — drop into %APPDATA%/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json (or merge with existing mcpServers block). wta-11 (windows-tauri-antchat-2026-05-19). Env-driven per gold-standard rule: never hard-code a URL/port. Operator sets ANT_HOST + ANT_PORT in their shell before launching Claude Desktop, or edits this file to point at their server. Template defaults are dev-local; production swaps via env or hand-edit.

env._comment_env_: ANT_HOST/PORT default to local dev. Override for Tailscale (your-host.example.com:6458 + ANT_TLS_CERT=true) or remote. ANT_API_KEY resolved from operator env at Claude Desktop launch — do NOT bake the key into this file.
